segments.text: That was close! Whiffed the tech—tough spot there, but...
segments.original_text: ました危なかったです アーバイト受け身をミスっちゃった難しいところでしたが

segments.text: Immediately came back! Looked solid, but came down to the wire
segments.original_text: すかさず取り返したに見えたがギリギリきた

segments.text: Fair at 144—1.8%—hasn't landed yet and Sonix avoids it here again
segments.original_text: 空中前取れる144、1.8%まだ食らってないようなものをここも避けますSonix

full_text: That was close! Whiffed the tech—tough spot there, but... Immediately came back! Looked solid, but came down to the wire Fair at 144—1.8%—hasn't landed yet and Sonix avoids it here again And then with the spin...
